creator: sune.falck@swipnet.se
text:
No KDE 1.1.2 applications can display gif images.

Fix: 

kde depends on qt-1.45 which is built without gif support.
Manually change #define QT_BUILTIN_GIF_READER from 0 to 1 in
"work/qt-1.45/include/qt_gif.h"
and also in 
"work/qt-1.45/src/kernel/qt_gif.h" and rebuild/reinstall qr-1.45.
Note that the change must be made in TWO places !
How-To-Repeat: Click Help on the toolbar to start kdehelp.
No images in the start page of kde help.
